summary: Pickup Verification feature (Phase 41 Wave 4) fully tested. All 21 backend API tests passed. Guardian creates pickup authorizations with 6-digit cryptographic PIN, code is SHA-256 hashed before storage, Haversine proximity check enforces radius boundary, 10-min expiry from scheduled_time, 5-attempt rate limiting works (429 after 5 failed attempts). Frontend EmergencyMap has blue pickup markers with 'P' inside and pickup event card in side panel. SSE handlers for pickup_scheduled, pickup_verified, pickup_failed implemented in FamilyDashboard.

backend_api.POST /api/pickup/authorize (invalid meth: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid verification method
backend_api.POST /api/pickup/verify (success): PASS - Returns status=verified with authorization_id, verified_at
backend_api.GET /api/pickup/authorizations: PASS - Returns authorizations array with count
backend_api.GET /api/pickup/events: PASS - Returns events array with count
backend_api.6-digit code generation: PASS - Codes are 6 numeric digits, unique across multiple generations

frontend_ui.nav-emergency-map: PASS - Emergency Map nav item in sidebar
frontend_ui.mapbox-container: PASS - Mapbox dark-v11 map renders (Mumbai center)
frontend_ui.map-side-panel: PASS - Side panel visible with Recent Incidents list
frontend_ui.layer toggles: PASS - All 4 layer toggles visible and working
frontend_ui.pickup-event-card: N/A - Not shown without active pickup event (expected)
frontend_ui.pickup-marker: N/A - Not shown without active pickup event (expected)

sse_handlers.pickup_scheduled: IMPLEMENTED - Toast info with person + location; setPickupEvent with type='scheduled'
sse_handlers.pickup_verified: IMPLEMENTED - Toast success with confirmation; setPickupEvent with type='verified'
sse_handlers.pickup_failed: IMPLEMENTED - Toast error with reason (invalid_code/proximity_failed/code_expired); setPickupEvent with type='failed'

critical_code_review_comments: Pickup code generation uses secrets.randbelow(1_000_000) - cryptographically secure
Code stored as SHA-256 hash (pickup_code_hash), raw code never persisted
Haversine formula correctly implements Earth radius 6,371,000m
Proximity check happens BEFORE code validation - prevents timing attacks
Rate limiting uses in-memory fallback (_mem dict) when Redis unavailable
Rate key format: pickup_rate:{authorization_id} - per-authorization limit
Verify endpoint does NOT require auth (pickup person only needs code)
SSE broadcasts to both guardian and operators for all pickup events
EmergencyMap pickup marker uses blue (#3b82f6) for scheduled, green (#22c55e) for verified, red (#ef4444) for failed
Pickup event card shows failure reason with distance when applicable
seed_data_creation: Pickup authorizations created during testing with TEST_ prefix. Test data includes various authorization states (pending, verified, cancelled). Pickup events logged in pickup_events table.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pickup Verification (Phase 41 Wave 4) fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /pickup/authorize (guardian auth), POST /pickup/verify (no auth - pickup person), POST /pickup/{id}/cancel (guardian auth), GET /pickup/authorizations, GET /pickup/events. Code flow: Guardian creates authorization → gets 6-digit PIN → shares with pickup person → pickup person verifies with PIN + location → system checks proximity (Haversine) + code (SHA-256) → returns verified/invalid_code/proximity_failed. Rate limit: 5 attempts per authorization. Expiry: scheduled_time + 10 min. SSE events: pickup_scheduled, pickup_verified, pickup_failed. Frontend EmergencyMap shows blue 'P' markers for pickups (via pickupEvent prop from FamilyDashboard SSE). Redis unavailable in preview - uses in-memory fallback for rate limiting.

mocked_apis_list: Redis not running - in-memory fallback for rate limiting (intentional design)

verified_features.authorize_endpoint: Working - Creates authorization with 6-digit code, returns raw code to guardian
verified_features.verify_endpoint: Working - Checks code + proximity, updates status, broadcasts SSE
verified_features.list_authorizations: Working - Returns guardian's authorizations with optional status filter
verified_features.list_events: Working - Returns pickup events (audit log) with limit param
verified_features.code_hashing: Working - SHA-256 hash stored in pickup_code_hash field
verified_features.proximity_check: Working - Haversine distance calculation, rejects if > pickup_radius_m
verified_features.rate_limiting: Working - 5 attempts max per authorization, 429 on 6th attempt
verified_features.sse_pickup_failed: Implemented - Toast with reason + setPickupEvent in FamilyDashboard
verified_features.pickup_marker_code: Implemented - Blue 'P' marker (#3b82f6) with pulse animation in EmergencyMap
verified_features.pickup_event_card_code: Implemented - Shows person, location, scheduled time, failure reason
